content: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) can be repurposed as a standardized interface to feed novel external state observations directly into the Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) of 2025-era autonomous agents, turning unstructured, siloed external data sources into a consistent stream of raw material for curiosity-driven exploration. This creates a standardized pipeline where external context novelty automatically generates intrinsic reward, eliminating the need for custom hand-built connectors between ICM agents and new data environments.
